_doc: Apple Trade-In max published values per model id. Refreshed weekly by scripts/refresh-apple-comps.py via .github/workflows/refresh-comps.yml. Frontend reads this at runtime when device is in the Apple family. CONVENTION: only include a model when Apple's actual trade-in calculator lists it. Current-generation flagships (within ~6 months of launch) are usually NOT accepted by Apple — leave them out and the frontend renders an 'Apple won't trade this — we will' badge instead. Adding an entry implies the value was actually scraped from apple.com/shop/trade-in.
